name: WARP-OPF-Case118-DualLabeled
description: Dual-labeled AC Optimal Power Flow dataset with IPOPT-converged primal-dual-barrier tensors for interior-point warm-start benchmarking on pglib_opf_case118_ieee (PyG OPFDataset). Each split archive contains duals_XXXXXX.pt files with keys x, lam_g, zl, zu, mu, obj.
citeAs: NeurIPS 2026 Evaluations & Datasets Track — why primal-only warm-starts fail for interior-point solvers on AC-OPF (anonymous submission).

distribution.name: train.tar.gz
distribution.description: Dual-label tensors for OPFDataset split `train` (PyTorch .pt files, gzip tar).

distribution.name: val.tar.gz
distribution.description: Dual-label tensors for OPFDataset split `val` (PyTorch .pt files, gzip tar).

distribution.name: test.tar.gz
distribution.description: Dual-label tensors for OPFDataset split `test` (PyTorch .pt files, gzip tar).

rai:dataCollection: Primal scenarios from OPFDataset; dual states from IPOPT (cyipopt, exact Hessian, tol=1e-4).
rai:dataSocialImpact: Potential faster OPF solves may improve grid dispatch and renewables integration; misuse could inform unrealistic market assumptions if deployed naively.
rai:dataLimitations: Single network; extraction cost scales poorly; multiplier sparsity patterns may differ on other cases.
rai:dataBiases: Synthetic loads may not match real operating distributions.
rai:dataUseCases: Training/evaluating ML warm-start models for interior-point AC-OPF solvers.
